label: California small claims dollar limit (individuals)
notes: Individual limit rose to $12,500 in recent years. No lawyers in the hearing. Verify current cap at selfhelp.courts.ca.gov before filing.

label: CA statute of limitations — personal injury
notes: Claims against a GOVERNMENT entity can require a claim in as little as 6 months — much shorter.

label: CA statute of limitations — written contract
notes: Oral contract is 2 years (§339). Debt past the SOL is generally uncollectable — don't restart the clock by paying/admitting.

label: CA deadline to answer a lawsuit after being served
notes: Miss it and the other side can get a DEFAULT judgment (auto-loss). Small claims has a shorter, different process.

label: Right to a free lawyer (criminal)
value: Yes — a public defender if you cannot afford one
notes: Applies to criminal charges (jail possible). There is NO free government lawyer in immigration or most civil cases — but legal aid/nonprofits help.
